name: How long do I have to file a workers comp claim after work accident in Utah?
description: Report in 180 days, file claim up to 3 years in Utah.[2]

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a workers comp claim after work accident in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report in 180 days, file claim up to 3 years in Utah.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Generally 3 years from injury date in Utah, but report within 180 days to employer.[2][4] Context: Statutes of limitations vary by injury type; death claims shorter.[7] Key factors: Employer notice prompt; medical causation must link timely.[4] Practical guidance: File ASAP to avoid disputes; use Labor Commission portal. Delays risk denial. Lawyer ensures compliance.
